column2: p2 <- ggplot(incacs16, aes(x = median_rent_e, y = total_jail_pop_rate)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.75) + theme_minimal() + xlim(900, 1500) + ylim(0, 1200) +
geom_smooth(method = "lm") + labs(title = "Median rent vs jail population rate")
p5 <- ggplot(incacs16, aes(x = hh_medincome_e, y = total_jail_pop_rate)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.75) + theme_minimal() +
geom_smooth(method = "lm") + labs(title = "Household median income vs jail population rate")
p3.5 <- ggplot(incacs16, aes(x = unemploy_rate_e, y = total_jail_pop_rate)) + geom_jitter(alpha = 0.75)  + geom_smooth(method = lm) + labs(title = "Unemployment rate vs jail population rate")
p4 <- ggplot(incacs16, aes(x = chci, y = total_jail_pop_rate)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.75) + xlim(0, 200000) + geom_smooth(method = "lm")
